timeline.title: Day One
timeline.note: Before either of us knew what this would become.

poetry.title: Notes on Staying
poetry.body:
I keep finding you
in the pauses between things —
the quiet after laughter,
the moment before sleep.

You are the most comfortable
silence I have ever been in.

letters.body:
Dear Poppi,

I am writing this because I could not say it aloud without laughing nervously. You are a strange and wonderful person. I am very glad you exist.

With love and mild terror,
Theo

glossary.def: The one who is truth. Also: the person who will steal your blanket at 3am and have no remorse about it.
The warmest word in the room. Reserved for him exclusively.
The expression Marlon makes when he already knows you're wrong but is waiting for you to figure it out yourself.

field_notes.text: Subject displays remarkable capacity for patience. Further study required to determine if this is genuine or strategic.
Subject has been observed laughing at his own jokes before delivering the punchline. Endearing. Statistically unusual.
Subject's presence makes ordinary rooms feel significantly more livable.

reading.title: Giovanni's Room
reading.author: James Baldwin
reading.note: Because you would have loved this in your English seminar.

reading.title: Call Me By Your Name
reading.author: Luca Guadagnino
reading.note: For the aesthetics. For the ache.
